subject: civic
topic_title: Activities of Drug Law Enforcement Agencies
learning_objectives: Describe the general activities of law enforcement agencies regarding drugs

sections.heading: NDLEA (National Drug Law Enforcement Agency)
sections.content:
Established by Decree 48 of 1990. Functions include:
* Eradicating illicit cultivation and demand for narcotic plants.
* Prosecuting drug law offenders.
* Eliminating root causes of drug production.

sections.heading: NAFDAC (National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control)
sections.content:
Established by Decree 15 of 1993. Functions include:
* Regulating and inspecting foods, drugs, and chemicals.
* Certifying products for consumption through laboratory tests.
* Registering medical appliances and production centers.

sections.heading: General Activities
sections.content:
Law enforcement agencies engage in:
* Detection and burning of fake/expired drugs.
* Arrest and prosecution of drug traffickers.
* Confiscation of smuggled items and destruction of illegal drug plantations.
